narrative:
88 Ohio House district has 72,495 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.5 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -8.0% D−R vs -21.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
